releaseNotes:
v0.24.0 — Windows .exe installer, Settings compression, Save-to-file support bundle, Delete-in-error, multi-device docs:

- New Windows installer (.exe) replaces the extract-the-ZIP flow. Per-user install, no admin elevation, optional desktop shortcut, standard uninstaller. Run the installer, click through, done. The legacy ZIP is still available at rxrescue.us/download/windows-zip for environments where .exe installers are blocked.

- Settings menu compression: scanner section uses horizontal chip-style selectors instead of vertical radio lists; Backup, Drive, Demo, Diagnostics, About moved into nested sub-screens. The top-of-Settings list now fits roughly one viewport on a phone.

- Save-to-file support bundle (Windows): Diagnostics → Save support bundle to file writes a timestamped .txt to your Documents folder and opens the folder in Explorer. Bypasses the Outlook-default Share intent — attach the file to whatever email client you actually use.

- Delete (scanned in error): new red button in the Edit Bottle dialog. Removes a typo'd or duplicate row WITHOUT counting as a stock pull on the Returns Manifest. The audit log records the honest reason. Distinct from Mark Pulled (which is for legitimate stock returning to the wholesaler).

- New public docs page at https://rxrescue.us/multi-device covering one-pharmacy-many-devices, adding a tablet, rotating a setup code, lost-device response, planned replacement, sync conflicts, and FAQ.

Download links above redirect through rxrescue.us to the GitHub release at github.com/SkyboundSystems/rxrescue-manifest/releases/tag/v0.24.0 — direct binary download, no OneDrive intercept.
